series_metadata.series_description: Provides information about serology and viral iso- lation test results from blood serum samples (example = FTA, HIV, Etc.).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain file for two years, destroy file in conjuction with destruction of paper files ; Paper: Maintain in office for one year, then transfer to the State Records Center for storage. Store in the State Records Center for one year, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
